case_title: CHENG, SHI YIN vs. CHIN, RICHARD et al

docket_entries.description: TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 04

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHIN, RICHARD RICHARD CHIN TO PAY 9752.68 BY 9/30/94. AND TO PAY 6245.82 IN TWO INSTALLMENTS. AND PAY 10% ON 6245.82. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH.
